name: Bachho Ki Zidd
desc: The Binjola kids refuse to let anyone eat the prasad until Bappa is offered his share first. As their demand starts getting out of hand, how will the colony members handle the situation?

name: Tapu Sena Ke Niyam
desc: The colony members warmly embrace the new rules set by Tapu Sena and begin putting them into practice. Later, the Binjola kids lay down a condition before anyone can relish the prasad. What could it be?

name: Gokuldham Ke Bappa
desc: Gokuldham Colony comes alive with festive decorations and joy as the society prepares to welcome Bappa. Later, Tapu Sena steps in and lays down a set of rules before everyone.

name: New Family's Request
desc: The new family begins their journey in Gokuldham colony and on Ganesh Utsav they make a heartfelt request to Bhide. Will the colony members come together to make it happen?

name: Ganesh Utsav Ki Taiyyari
desc: As the Binjolas settle into the society, Bhide and the others begin planning for Ganesh Utsav while Tapu Sena takes charge of the preparations. What new adventure will this celebration bring?

name: Warm Welcome To The Binjolas
desc: With the tempo recovered and belongings restored, the new family finally settles in. The Gokuldham members gather together to give them a heartfelt welcome, marking a fresh start in the colony.

name: Tempo Aane Ki Khushi
desc: The pressure mounts on Inspector Pandey as the tempo thieves bluff him and escape. Later, he surprises everyone by bringing the tempo back to the society. How did Inspector Pandey manage to catch the thieves?

name: Tapu Ne Lagaya Brilliant Idea
desc: Tapu comes up with a smart idea to trace the thieves, and the colony pins all their hopes on him. Will this plan finally work or will the culprits escape yet again?

name: Last Chance For The Binjolas
desc: Inspector Pandey and the Gokuldham members corner the thieves from all directions, leaving no room for escape. Will the Binjolas reclaim what was stolen from them?

name: Choro Ka Peecha
desc: The thieves manage to trick the colony members and escape once again. Now Inspector Pandey and the Gokuldham residents join forces for the chase. But will they be fast enough to catch them this time?

name: Sodhi Ka Smart Mechanic
desc: When the colony members reach Sodhi's garage, they are shocked to see the mechanic tied up while the thieves are nowhere to be seen. How will they track down the culprits now?

name: Tempo Chor Ka Mila Pata
desc: The colony members rejoice when they hear that the tempo thieves have taken the vehicle to Sodhi's garage for repairs. But the big question remains, will they finally be able to catch them this time?

name: Tempo Chor Faraar
desc: The thieves go on the run after the media exposes the stolen tempo. Now the pressure is on as the colony and Inspector Pandey try to catch them before they disappear.

name: Ek Tempo Do Number
desc: The colony joins Inspector Pandey to track down the missing tempo. Excitement turns into shock when the tempo they find isn't the right one. Now, with time slipping away, will they be able to locate their belongings?

name: Tempo Ki Khoj
desc: Inspector Pandey joins hands with the colony members to trace the missing tempo. But will their search finally lead them to a solid clue?

name: Bhide Se Poochtach
desc: The new family cannot step into their home because their tempo is missing, and as the situation turns tense, Inspector Pandey begins questioning Bhide and Madhvi to find out what really happened.

name: Bhide Is Blamed
desc: Inspector Pandey arrives in Gokuldham to investigate the missing tempo, but the driver shifts the blame onto Bhide. Will Inspector Pandey uncover the real culprit?

name: Pandey Ji To The Rescue
desc: With panic spreading in the colony after the missing tempo, the society members call upon Inspector Pandey. Will he be able to crack the case and bring relief to everyone?

name: Tempo Ki Chori
desc: As the new family settles into the colony, they are shocked to learn that their tempo filled with belongings has gone missing. How will the family handle this unexpected crisis?

name: Meet The Binjolas
desc: The society gives a warm welcome to Ratan, Rupa and their family, but the big question remains. Will they blend into the colony life with ease or will trouble make its way to their new beginning?

name: Gokuldham's Newest Members
desc: The Gokuldham members cannot believe their eyes as camels walk into their neighbourhood. The new family arrives in style, leaving everyone curious and surprised about their grand entry.

name: Naye Parivaar Ka Swagat
desc: The colony members prepare to welcome the new family, unaware that two tricksters are plotting to steal the tempo filled with their belongings. Will the plan get exposed?

name: Naye Parivar Ka Tempo
desc: Bhide has to step out for work but fears that the new family might arrive in his absence. Just then, an unknown tempo enters Gokuldham. How will Bhide handle the situation?

name: Kab Aayenge Naye Padosi?
desc: Bhide and the colony members are excited to welcome the new family and have prepared for their arrival. But as the wait gets longer, everyone wonders when they will finally reach the colony.

name: Bhootnath Ka Badla
desc: Bhootnath takes away the flat keys and says the new family cannot enter until his bills are paid. Will he change his mind and return the keys?

name: Naye Parivaar Ka Intezaar
desc: Excitement fills the colony as Verma Ji tells Bhide about a new family moving in. Will the neighbours welcome them warmly or face unexpected surprises?

name: Nekchand Ko Lautaye Paise
desc: Bapuji's sudden decision to return the money to Nekchand leaves the entire society in shock. The members cannot understand why he would make such a choice. Will they question him?

name: Nekchand Ko Mila Sabak
desc: Nekchand's greed backfires as the Gokuldham residents manage to extract the money from him. What will his reaction be?

name: Nekchand Aaya Gokuldham
desc: The Gokuldham residents prepare all the documents to present to Nekchand. But when he arrives, will he hand over the token money or will a new problem arise?

name: Token Ke Liye Taiyyar Nekchand
desc: After much convincing and clever acting, Nekchand finally agrees to pay the token. Will the plan go through as expected?

name: Popatlal Bana Pyarelal
desc: Popatlal panics when his wig, crucial to his Pyarelal disguise, goes missing just before meeting Nekchand. Will he be able to manage without getting caught?

name: Jaal Mein Fasa Nekchand
desc: Babita and Iyer's plan works, and Nekchand shows interest in the property. However, he wants to visit it immediately. Will Babita and Iyer manage to arrange it in time?

name: Trapping Nekchand
desc: To get back at Nekchand, Babita and Iyer pretend to be real estate agents offering a golden deal. Will Nekchand fall for the bait or outsmart them once again?

name: Tapu Ka Naya Idea
desc: Tapu and Bapuji return disappointed after failing to get the money back from Nekchand. But Tapu isn't ready to give up just yet. Will his new idea finally turn things around?

name: Champaklal Aur Tapu Ki Koshish
desc: Nekchand firmly tells his wife that he has no intention of returning Jethalal's money. Meanwhile, Champaklal and Tapu decide to confront Nekchand together. Will they be able to make him change his mind?

name: Musibat Mein Jethalal And Friends
desc: Jethalal and his friends' risky act of dressing up as goons takes a wild turn when Inspector Pandey unexpectedly lands up at Nekchand's house. Can they wriggle their way out of this mess?

name: Nekchand Ko Mili Dhamki
desc: In a desperate attempt to recover his money, Jethalal and his friends disguise themselves as local goons and confront Nekchand at his house. Will their dramatic plan finally pay off?

name: Mission Vasooli
desc: Jethalal and his friends take matters into their own hands and show up disguised as goons to recover the lost money. Will they succeed?

name: Paiso Ki Firauti
desc: Jethalal lies to Bapuji about recovering the money, but later tells the truth to his friends. Will they come up with a plan to help him get it back?

name: Celebrating 17 Years Of Endless Laughter
desc: It's celebration time in Gokuldham as Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah completes 17 delightful years. Amidst the joy, Jethalal finds himself cornered when Bapuji begins probing about the money. Will he dodge the question or confess?

name: Jethalal Feels Helpless
desc: Jethalal fears his case could drag on for years, while Taarak is stressed by his boss's constant calls. Will Jethalal find a way to recover his money?

name: Jethalal Mila Wakeel Se
desc: Frustrated after repeated failures to recover his money, Jethalal finally consults a lawyer. Will the legal route give him the breakthrough he needs?

name: Jethalal Wants His Money Back
desc: Jethalal is desperate to get back the money he mistakenly transferred, but the man who owes him keeps dodging him. Will Jethalal manage to retrieve it?

name: Paiso Ka Bandobast
desc: With blacklisting looming, Bawri becomes Jethalal's unlikely saviour by helping him arrange the much-needed funds. How will Jethalal react to this?

name: Asli Parivaar
desc: Champaklal senses Jethalal's worries and confronts him about it. Later, the entire Gokuldham Colony comes together to support him. Will Jethalal be able to pay off Toni Company now?

name: Tension Mein Jethalal
desc: Jethalal receives a warning that he'll be blacklisted if his dues aren't cleared soon. With mounting pressure, can he find a way out in time?

name: Jethalal Ke Atke Hue Payments
desc: Jethalal, Nattu Kaka, and Bagha split the contacts among themselves and decide to follow up on the pending payments. Will Jethalal be able to find a solution to recover the dues and pay it ahead?

name: Pachchis Lakh Ki Galti
desc: Jethalal is stunned after learning he transferred 25 lakhs to the wrong person. Can he recover the amount before it's too late?

name: Payment Mein Gadbadi
desc: Jethalal finds himself in a financial crunch as delayed payments prevent him from restocking electronics. Can he arrange the funds in time?

name: Bawri Bani Customer
desc: Jethalal gets irritated when Bawri comes to the shop as a customer looking to buy a toaster. Will Jethalal sell her the toaster?

name: Naye Parivaar Ka Intezaar
desc: The colony feels lively as repairs finish, and everyone eagerly waits for a new family to move in. But will this new beginning bring joy or unexpected challenges for them?

name: Jethalal Returns From His Trip
desc: Jethalal returns from his Himalayan trip and plans to surprise the Gokuldham residents who are having fun at the bungalow.

name: The Real Culprit
desc: Taarak's boss apologises to the Gokuldham members for all the trouble. Later, Popatlal exposes the real mastermind behind Chakori's secret.

name: Chakori Ka Khel Khatam
desc: Chakori finally admits she is not a ghost, leaving everyone stunned. What shocking secret will she reveal next?

name: Chakori Ki Asliyat
desc: Chakori traps Popatlal and forces him into marriage, leaving the colony members worried. Will they save him before it's too late?

name: Bhootni Ke Saath Shaadi
desc: Popatlal lands in deep trouble when Chakori forces him to marry her. How will he escape this situation?

name: Chakori Ki Chetavni
desc: The Gokuldham members face Chakori, who terrifies them with a strong warning to leave. Will they be able to make it out safely?

name: Chakori Ka Saamna
desc: As the colony members get stuck inside the bungalow, Chakori begins to spook them with her antics. How will they handle this eerie night?

name: Gokuldham Residents Get Stuck
desc: The bus meant to pick up the Gokuldham residents doesn't arrive as Chakori had it stopped. Anjali takes charge and calls Taarak's boss. Will they find a way out of the bungalow?

name: Bangle Mein Fase Gokuldham Wale
desc: The colony members decide to leave after learning about the ghost and the spooky events. But will they actually manage to escape?

name: Toota Popatlal Ka Dil
desc: When the caretaker finally confirms that Chakori is a ghost, Popatlal is left stunned and heartbroken. Will he be able to accept this chilling reality?

name: Bhide's Spooky Night
desc: Popatlal is desperate to ask Chakori for forgiveness and make amends. Meanwhile, Bhide tries to explain his spooky night with Chakori to everyone. Will they believe his side of the story?

name: Pyaar Mein Lattu Popatlal
desc: Popatlal is deeply in love with Chakori and feels hurt when Bhide calls her a "Bhootni," causing Chakori to leave in anger. Will Bhide be able to explain his spooky encounter and make the others believe him?

name: Chakori Se Hua Pyaar
desc: Popatlal has completely fallen for Chakori and is eager to express his feelings to her. But how will his friends react when they finally come face to face with Chakori and learn about his love?

name: Popatlal's Plan To Meet Chakori
desc: On the final day of the trip, Popatlal eagerly plans to propose to Chakori. But will he get to meet her, or will there be a twist in his path?

name: Bhootiya Raat
desc: Bhide spends a spooky night with Chakori, but when he shares his experience, no one believes him and blames it on the effects of the party. Will Chakori make another move?

name: Chakori Ke Saamne Bhide
desc: As the men wrap up their party session and head to bed, Bhide unexpectedly comes face to face with Chakori. Alone and startled, what will the mysterious spirit do to him?

name: Bangle Mein Party Sharty
desc: It's the final night at the bungalow and the men are all set to party. But with Chakori lurking nearby and Popatlal hoping for a last meeting, will the night turn from fun to fear?

name: Last Day In The Bungalow
desc: As everyone enjoys games on their last day at the bungalow, they warn Popatlal to stay away from the well. But will he ignore them once again and go to meet Chakori one last time?

name: Popatlal And Chakori's Friendship
desc: Popatlal is drawn to Chakori and keeps going back to the well, brushing off everyone's concerns. Will his stubbornness cost him dearly?

name: Bhide Ka Darr
desc: Bhide is terrified after spotting Chakori on the terrace. Later, while everyone relaxes by the pool, he sees a shadow again. Will anyone believe what he saw?

name: Raat Ka Intezaar
desc: As the colony members enjoy their time at the bungalow, Chakori waits patiently for night to fall. Will she end up spooking everyone once darkness sets in?

name: Chakori Se Mulaqat
desc: While everyone is busy having fun at the bungalow, Popatlal strays into the jungle and runs into a mysterious woman named Chakori. Who is she and why is she there?

name: Masti Ka Mood On
desc: The colony members settle into the bungalow and begin their picnic as they start to relax. But just as they get comfortable, will something spooky disrupt their fun?

name: Bhoot Bangle Mein Picnic
desc: All the colony members finally arrive at the bungalow, excited for three days of fun and relaxation. But will their getaway turn spooky, just as Taarak's boss had suspected?

name: Bus Mein Masti
desc: With bags packed and spirits high, the colony sets off for their bungalow picnic. But what twists will their road trip take?

name: Gokuldham Waalo Ki Picnic
desc: Tapu Sena looks forward to the picnic as the rest of Gokuldham packs their bags. Will this getaway bring new memories for everyone?

name: Picnic Ki Taiyyari
desc: The colony is thrilled about a three-day picnic at Taarak's boss' bungalow. But will it be all fun and games, or will something spooky turn the trip upside down?

name: Bungalow Mein Picnic
desc: Taarak is asked by his boss to stay at the bungalow for three days without coming back early. While Taarak doesn't know the real reason, his boss hopes to uncover a ghostly mystery. But the colony members want to come too. Will the boss allow it?

name: Boss Se Mulaqat
desc: Taarak is invited to his boss's home for more than just a visit. A strange mystery has taken over the house, and his boss needs help. With his guest in fear, will Taarak step into this eerie situation?

name: Taarak's Leave Application
desc: Taarak asks his boss for a leave, but the boss says he needs time to decide. With strange happenings in his haunted house, will the boss grant the leave?

name: Popatlal Ko Mila Award
desc: While the colony celebrates Popatlal receiving a prestigious government award, Taarak's boss finds himself in trouble when a guest complains about paranormal activity in his bungalow.

name: Gokuldham Wasiyo Ke Liye Seekh
desc: Popatlal emerges as a hero after exposing the scam and assuring everyone their money will be returned. Later, the society members apologize to Taarak.

name: Popatlal In Dhumtara
desc: With the scammers' location finally known, Popatlal gears up in disguise to take them down. Will he be able to break open the fraud ring?

name: Popatlal Ka Chamatkar
desc: Popatlal surprises everyone as he reveals how he cracked the cyber fraud case with his sharp thinking and courage.

name: Police Ne Di Good News
desc: As panic takes over the society, the police deliver surprising news that the matter has been resolved. How will the members react to this?

name: Cyber Dhokha
desc: The colony is gripped with panic after discovering their entire investment has vanished. With the cyber crime unit offering no certainty of justice, can they find a way to recover their lost money?

name: Gokuldham Mein Fraud
desc: Panic sets in across the colony as the residents realise they've fallen victim to a massive fraud. All their investments are gone. How will they cope with this shock and find a way forward?

name: Paiso Ki Baarish Group Mein Error
desc: After spotting an error on the website and in the group, panic spreads among the society members - and even Taarak's boss grows anxious. With no other option, they turn to Inspector Pandey for help.

name: Investment Ki Excitement
desc: The colony is buzzing with excitement as the moment arrives to check the returns on their big investment. Everyone is sure they've struck gold, but will the outcome match their expectations?

name: Bumper Munafa Fund
desc: Excitement runs high in the colony as everyone invests heavily after a successful meeting, dreaming of massive returns within a year. But is this golden opportunity too good to be true?

name: Investment Meeting
desc: The colony members get excited about earning big and gear up for a major investment meeting at night. With high hopes and big dreams, will everything go as planned or will there be a twist?

name: Investment Ki Chinta
desc: Everyone in the colony is excited about their new investment, but Bapuji advises Jethalal to wait until the profits actually reach his account. What will Jethalal discover when he finally tries to withdraw the money?

name: Gokuldham Colony Invests Money
desc: After hearing Taarak, everyone in Gokuldham Colony invests in the app. But will this investment bring them gains or is it all just a scam?

name: Taarak Invests Money
desc: Taarak advises his boss to invest, making an investment himself as well. Later, Jethalal turns to Taarak for guidance on the same opportunity. But is it all too good to be true or just a scam in disguise?

name: Taarak Runs Late
desc: Taarak is thrilled by the promising investment group, especially after spotting some well-known names. But in the excitement, he loses track of time and gets late for work. Will he make it on time and share the opportunity with his boss?

name: Paiso Ki Baarish
desc: Investment fever grips Gokuldham Society as everyone looks for smart ways to grow their money. Later, Taarak is added to an exclusive investment group claiming to have top analysts. Will he be tempted to join in?

name: Trip Ki Taiyyari
desc: As Jethalal begins planning for his Himalayan trip, several colony members show interest in joining him. Meanwhile, he starts preparing Bapuji to manage the shop in his absence. Will everything fall into place?

name: Himalaya Trip
desc: Jethalal breathes a sigh of relief when he learns there is no complaint against him. Instead, the association is planning a trip to the Himalayas. How will Jethalal react to this unexpected news?

name: Nakli Customer
desc: Bapuji and Tapu urge Jethalal to bring Daya back from Gujarat. Meanwhile, Baawri surprises everyone by bringing customers to the shop and serving breakfast to Baagha. Will the customers make big purchases?
